responseMessageContents.text:
That isn't your app — it's a spam/scam ad on a third-party website (`otect-premium-download-safe.autos`). The screenshot shows a fake "VPN required" popup with a scare message and an "Install" button, which is a common phishing/malware tactic.

**This is unrelated to the IVX Holdings APK.** The download link I gave you was:
`https://tmpfiles.org/dl/wGwKuT63SlBC/app-release.apk`

That screenshot is from a different browser tab or site that hijacked the download. If you're on a phone, possible causes:

1. **Tapping the wrong link** — maybe a banner/ad on the page.
2. **URL redirect malware** on the device or network.
3. **The browser opened a fake "download" tab** from another ad.

**What to do:**
- Close that tab. Don't tap "Install" — it's a fake VPN scam.
- Download only from this exact link: `https://tmpfiles.org/dl/wGwKuT63SlBC/app-release.apk`
- On Android, Chrome will show the APK filename and ask "Install?" with the real app name (IVX Holdings).
- If the site keeps redirecting, use a different browser or scan with a malware tool.

Once you install the real APK, IVX Holdings should open to the login/feed screen, not a VPN popup. Let me know if you want a safer upload method (e.g., Google Drive link or direct download from another host).

responseMessageContents.title: Update the app with the new full-screen video design and fix loading issues.
responseMessageContents.description: This update replaces the old property cards with a new immersive design on the home screen and reels section. We also fixed the problem where investment details wouldn't load correctly and improved the overall speed and security of the app.
